entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The legume crop in which a new source of genetic male sterility was identified.

entities.name: GENETIC MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A condition where the plant is unable to produce functional pollen due to genetic factors.

entities.name: CYTOLOGICAL EXAMINATION
entities.description: The study of cells using microscopy to examine anther development.

entities.name: ABNORMAL ANTHER DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The improper growth of anthers associated with male sterility.

entities.name: DEGENERATION OF POLLEN MOTHER CELLS
entities.description: The breakdown of cells that normally produce pollen.

entities.name: YOUNG TETRAD STAGE
entities.description: The specific developmental stage of pollen cells where degeneration occurs.

entities.name: PHENOLOGICAL CLASSES
entities.description: Groups of plants categorized by their flowering time.

entities.name: DECEMBER SOWINGS
entities.description: The timing of planting the crops in December.

entities.name: 27 S
entities.description: The geographic latitude where the research was conducted.

entities.name: HYBRID PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of creating hybrid plants for improved agricultural traits.
